name: README.md Generator — Offline & Private
description: Create professional README.md files from project descriptions. Runs entirely in your browser — no servers, no tracking.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; connect-src 'none';
